# maoxunxing.com

> Personal tech & investment blog (Hugo, bilingual EN / zh-CN).

## Site
- https://maoxunxing.com/

## Main sections
- Blog: /posts/
- Notes: /notes/
- Book reports: /book-reports/
- About: /about/

## Source
- Repository: https://github.com/XingMXTeam/maoxunxing.com

## Usage policy
- Public content is for reading and citation; follow the site’s license and copyright for reuse.
- For automated crawling or AI training, respect robots.txt and applicable laws; contact the site owner for commercial use.
